title: Level Z - Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: A level Z add-on for the Oh the Biomes We've Gone mod
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Oh The Biomes We've Gone mod.

This addon adds level requirements for mining added blocks such as stones, ice and sandstone. This way you can add the Oh The Biomes We've Gone mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
